name: echonextdi

metadata.name: echonextdi
metadata.summary: Light and intuitive Dependency Injection Library for pyEchoNext Project

documentation:
# EchoNext DI

Light and intuitive Dependency Injection Library for pyEchoNext Project
Explore the docs »

Getting Started · Basic Usage · Documentation · License


Light and intuitive Dependency Injection Library for [pyEchoNext Project](https://github.com/alexeev-prog/pyEchoNext). ## Tests coverage To test the library, PyTest with the pytest-cov plugin is used. You can look at the tests in [tests directory](./tests) | Statements | Miss | Coverage | |------------|------------|----------| | 77 | 13 | 83% |

(back to top)

## Check Other My Projects + [SQLSymphony](https://github.com/alexeev-prog/SQLSymphony) - simple and fast ORM in sqlite (and you can add other DBMS) + [Burn-Build](https://github.com/alexeev-prog/burn-build) - simple and fast build system written in python for C/C++ and other projects. With multiprocessing, project creation and caches! + [OptiArch](https://github.com/alexeev-prog/optiarch) - shell script for fast optimization of Arch Linux + [libnumerixpp](https://github.com/alexeev-prog/libnumerixpp) - a Powerful C++ Library for High-Performance Numerical Computing + [pycolor-palette](https://github.com/alexeev-prog/pycolor-palette) - display beautiful log messages, logging, debugging. + [shegang](https://github.com/alexeev-prog/shegang) - powerful command interpreter (shell) for linux written in C

(back to top)

## 🚀 Getting Started EchoNext DI is available on [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/echonextdi). Simply install the package into your project environment with PIP: ```bash pip install echonextdi ``` Once installed, you can start using the library in your Python projects.

(back to top)

classes.name: echonextdi.containers.container.Container

methods.name: echonextdi.containers.container.Container.__init__
documentation: Constructs a new instance.

methods.name: echonextdi.containers.container.Container.register
documentation:
Register dependency in container

:param          key:                                               The key
:type           key:                                               str
:param          provider:                                          The provider
:type           provider:                                          Provider

:raises         DependencyAlreadyExistsError:  dependency is already registred

methods.name: echonextdi.containers.container.Container.override
documentation:
Override dependency

:param          key:                                      The key
:type           key:                                      str
:param          provider:                                 The provider
:type           provider:                                 Provider

:raises         DependencyNotFoundError:  Depedency not found for overriding

methods.name: echonextdi.containers.container.Container.get
documentation:
Get dependency instance by key

:param          key:                                      The key
:type           key:                                      str
:param          raise_error:                      The raise error
:type           raise_error:                      bool

:returns:       provider instance or None
:rtype:         Any

:raises         DependencyNotFoundError:  dependency by key not found

methods.name: echonextdi.containers.container.Container.resolve
documentation:
Automatic resolve dependencies for class

:param          cls:  The cls
:type           cls:  Type[T]

:returns:       class object
:rtype:         T
This class describes a container.
